onboarding.title: Welcome to Your Journal 🌸
onboarding.subtitle: A cozy space for daily reflections, mood tracking, and gratitude
onboarding.sampleDataDescription: We've added 3 sample entries, 7 tags, and 15 writing prompts to help you get started.

steps.title: Write your first entry
steps.description: Capture your thoughts, mood, and gratitude. There's no wrong way to journal — even a sentence counts.

steps.title: Track your mood
steps.description: Pick a mood for each entry and watch patterns emerge on your Calendar and Moods pages.

steps.title: Get inspired by prompts
steps.description: Stuck on what to write? Visit the Prompts tab for daily writing prompts across 7 categories.

steps.title: Use your AI journaling companion
steps.description: Ask your agent to create entries, suggest prompts, or summarize how your mood has been lately.

reference.overview: A daily journal with mood tracking, gratitude lists, writing prompts, and tag-based organization. Track mood patterns on the Calendar and Moods views. Use the AI agent to journal conversationally.

concepts.name: Entries
concepts.description: Your diary entries with mood, highlight, content, gratitude list, tags, and more.

concepts.name: Tags
concepts.description: Color-coded labels like personal 💜, work 💼, travel ✈️, dreams 🌙 to organize entries.

concepts.name: Prompts
concepts.description: Writing prompts across 7 categories — reflection, gratitude, creativity, growth, memory, dream, and fun.

prompts: Write a journal entry about my day — how I'm feeling and what happened
How has my mood been this week?
Give me a writing prompt for tonight
I'm feeling anxious — help me journal about it
What was my mood streak this month?
tips: Short entries count — even a mood pick and one sentence is valuable over time
Use the Gratitude field to list 1–3 things each day, no matter how small
Check the Moods tab to spot patterns you might not notice day-to-day
Grab a random prompt from the Prompts tab when you don't know what to write
Pin your favorite or most meaningful entries to keep them at the top

entries.title: Your journal is waiting
entries.description: Start with today. How are you feeling? What happened? Even a few words count.
entries.suggestedPrompt: Write a journal entry for today — how I'm feeling and one thing I'm grateful for

tags.title: No tags yet
tags.description: Tags help you organize entries by theme. Add some to get started.
tags.suggestedPrompt: Add a few journal tags like personal, work, and travel

prompts.title: No prompts yet
prompts.description: Writing prompts inspire your entries. Add some or ask your agent to generate a few.
prompts.suggestedPrompt: Add 5 writing prompts for a daily journal covering reflection, gratitude, and creativity
